raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N tas notikke / kad tee
Laudis kurneja / ne pa-
tikke tas tam KUN-
GAM/ un tas KUNGGS dsirde-
ja to / un wiꞥſch Bahrsiba ap-
skaitahs / un ta KUNGA uig-
guns eedede winnu Starpâ / un
norihje ta Lehgera Gallu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad brehze tee Laudis us
Mohfu: Un Mohsus peeluhdse
to KUNGU/ un tas uigguns no-
flahpe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz nofanze wiꞥſch
tahs Weetas Wahrdu Tabeera/
tapehz / ka ta KUNGA uigguns
starp teem bij eededsees
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un weens Puks no wiﬀa-
deem faſkrehjuscheim Laudim/ tas
winnu Starpâ bija/eekahrojahs/
tapehz raudaja tee Israeta Behr-
ni atkaſ / fazzidami.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kas ehdina muhs ar Gallu/
mehs atgahdajamees to Siwju/
fo mehs Egiptes- Semine welti
ehdam/to Augurku/ to Melonn/
to Lohku/to Sihpotn/ un to Kip-
lofku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet nu irr muhsu Meeſa
pagurrust/ jo newa neneela ka tas
Manna ween preeſch muhsahn
Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Manna bija itt ka
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Koriandera Sehlas / un isra-
dsijahs ka Bedelljons.
8. Un tee Laudis jkrehje schurp
un turp/ un faſrahje to/un malle
to Dsirnôs/ jeb sagruhde to Mee-
serôs/ un wahrija to Bohdôs/ un
taifija no ta Karraschas/ un win-
na Smakka bija itt ka jaunas
Etjes Smakka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Un kad ta Raffa Nakti Leh-
geri nokritte/ tad kritte tas Mann
lihdstur wirfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad dsirdeja Mohsus tohs
Laudis raudajam ar winnu
Sainehin / ikweenu preeſch sa-
wa Dsihwokta Durvim / un ta
KUNGA Bahrsiba apskaitahs
tohti / un tas Mohsum arri ne
patikke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Mohsus fazzija us to
KUNGU: Kapelhz eſti tu tawam
Kalpam tik gruhti darrijs ? un
tapehz ue efmu es tawas Azzis
Scheblastibu atraddis? ka tu wiſ-
fo ſcho Lauschu Nastu us man-
ni lizzis eſti ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wojefmu es wiﬀius schohs
Laudis mannas Meeſas nefﬁs?
efmu es tohs Dsemdinajis? ka tu
us manni gribbi fazzijht : Neſs
tohs tawa Klehpi / itt ka weens
Behrnu Ankletajs weenn sihda-
mu Behrnu nefis us to Semmi/
fo tu winno Tehweem swehrejis
eſti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No kurrenes warretu es
Galtu dabbuht / wiﬀeem scheem
Laudim doht / jo tee rauda prett
manni/ fazzidani: Dohd muins
Galtu/ ka mehs ehſt warram.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
